Document research findings or technical details related to the project.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Information is accurate and relevant to the project
- [ ] Key insights / takeaways are clearly highlighted
- [ ] Sources or references are included (if applicable)
- [ ] Committed to the appropriate `/research` directory
